meta.title: The Types of Mouse Brain Cells Susceptible to Polyoma Virus Infection in vitro

abstractHtml: Using the immunofluorescence technique with antisera directed against markers on mouse brain cells, polyoma virus was found to infect in vitro, type 1 astrocytes, brain fibroblasts and leptomeningeal cells but not oligodendrocytes, type 2 astrocytes or neurones.
